jei.tech_revised.layout.aod_converter.li: 5W x 5L x 12H cylinder shell (controller at front-center base).
Y0 shell specials: Energy (-1,0,0), O2 In (1,0,0), Input (-2,0,2), Output (2,0,2).
All other shell blocks are AOD Converter Frames.
jei.tech_revised.layout.oxygen_converter: 5W x 5L x 7H cylinder shell (controller at front-center base).
Y0 shell specials: Energy (-1,0,0), Water In (1,0,0), O2 Out (-2,0,2), H2 Out (2,0,2).
All other shell blocks are Oxygen Converter Frames.
